children.name: div
children.textContent: Invoice #1079 is 4 days overdue. A firm follow-up can unlock $6,800 immediately.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Moves $4,200 past payroll — keeps your buffer intact without late fees.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Request $7,600 upfront (50%) on Invoice #1082 to bridge the payroll gap.

children.textContent: Offer Metro Catering a 2% early-pay discount for immediate settlement.
